<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Vonage\Client\Response; use RuntimeException; use function array_diff; use function array_keys; use function implode; class Response extends AbstractResponse { /** * Allow specific responses to easily define required parameters. * * @var array */ protected $expected = []; public function __construct(array $data) { $keys = array_keys($data); $missing = array_diff($this->expected, $keys); if ($missing) { throw new RuntimeException('missing expected response keys: ' . implode(', ', $missing)); } $this->data = $data; } }
